name: mad-skills
description: A small collection of Agent Skills, installable individually.

plugins.name: devils-advocate
plugins.description: Dispatch a subagent to argue against a decision before you commit. For the calls that are costly to get wrong.

plugins.name: trains-of-thought-audit
plugins.description: Find where a long, much-edited or LLM-written document contradicts itself: drifting numbers, broken invention numbering, repudiated claims that resurface.
